## 🔴 PRIORITY — BRANDON IS ANGRY, RIGHT NOW (dm-brandon, live 6:33am PT)

Brandon messaged Richard this morning at 6:32am PT and is escalating in real-time. The tone is sharp and Richard is on the back foot. Exchange in order:

1. **Brandon 6:32:** "why is there a call on the calendar tonight?"
2. **Richard 6:33:** "I left the regular sync on (cancelled just last week)"
3. **Richard 6:33:** "should I cancel the series?"

5. **Brandon 6:33:** "this looks bad that it was never updated and now we're canceling 'last minute'"
6. **Brandon 6:33:** "please update the series to reflect when calls are actually occurring"
7. **Richard 6:34:** "I guess that's where I'm uncertain, because wouldn't biweekly mean that we would meet this week?"
8. **Richard 6:34:** "if we cancelled last week?"
9. **Brandon 6:35:** "we didn't cancel last week. They had asked to reschedule"
10. **Brandon 6:35:** "they didn't get back to us on a time - had you every asked Alexis?" ← **Brandon's last message, awaiting Richard's reply**

**What's happening:** This is the Alexis (AU POC) biweekly sync series. Brandon had established biweekly cadence via email. Richard treated last week's reschedule-that-never-happened as a cancellation and left the calendar series on its default weekly, which made this week's invite look unexpected. Brandon's read: Richard never updated the calendar per his earlier direction, and now it looks like Richard is canceling last-minute on AU stakeholders.

**[ACTION-RW — BLOCKING BRANDON 1:1 AT 1:30PM]:**
- Reply to Brandon: did Richard ever follow up with Alexis after she asked to reschedule last week? If not, say so directly.
- Update the calendar series now — either fix to biweekly pattern or cancel-and-recreate as biweekly. Confirm to Brandon when done.
- This is the third scheduling/comms lapse on AU in 2 weeks (Lena 14d reply backlog, AU handoff OOO conflict, now Alexis series). Brandon is pattern-matching on reliability. Do not walk into the 1:1 with this unresolved.

## 🔴 PRIORITY — AU HANDOFF DOC REVIEW (ab-paid-search-abix, Mon PM)

Multiple Brandon asks landed yesterday. Two threads, both still warm:

### Thread 1 — GenBI handoff prompt test ([link](https://amazon.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C065KKT53DJ/p1776722626261749))

**Status:** Action transferred to Richard. Walk through attribution gaps with Mukesh before handoff rollout. **[ACTION-RW]** — Mukesh DM needs follow-up today with side-by-side Adobe/GenBI for brand under-attribution.

### Thread 2 — AU max clicks + kw analysis insights ([link](https://amazon.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C065KKT53DJ/p1776696004349039))

### Thread 3 — AU handoff doc final review scheduling
